rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOAN H. ELMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Order revised as follows: Caption page - county changed to San Francisco from Placer and Final Distribution moved so it comes first in the title of the order; paragraph 23 - changed to state beneficiaries listed on Exhibit D to the petition instead of Exhibit D to this Order; paragraph #5 of the order struck as neither the caption, the petition nor the prayer makes any mention of payment of fees and any agreement for payment of fees in excess of those authorized by the probate code for administration of estates is void (Probate Code section 10803; Exhibit D removed from order (Local Rule 14.24.B.).
